message:
chore(gitignore): ignore Claude Code scheduled_tasks.lock runtime files

Claude Code writes .claude/scheduled_tasks.lock as session-scoped
runtime state (holds PID + sessionId for scheduling coordination).
Never belongs in git.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -117,6 +117,10 @@ artifacts/
 # Agent worktree and target directories
 .claude/worktrees/
 .codex-targets/
+
+# Claude Code runtime lock files
+.claude/*.lock
+.claude/scheduled_tasks.lock
 .target-*/
 
 # UBS (Ultimate Bug Scanner) reports
